arts.ttl: Report: Joao Felix ‘asks to leave’ Chelsea amid Aston Villa transfer interest
arts.sum: Joao Felix is looking to leave Chelsea as he is frustrated over his lack of playing time, according to Duncan Castles. The reporter said via The Transfers Podcast that the Portugal international is looking for pastures new, with a switch away from Stamford Bridge on the cards. The 25-year-old made a permanent move to Chelsea […] The post Report: Joao Felix ‘asks to leave’ Chelsea amid Aston Villa transfer interest appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'It's a business, money talks!' - will Aston Villa sell Duran and Watkins?
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundits Stephen Warnock, Joe Hart and Julien Laurens discuss whether Aston Villa will agree to sell strikers Jhon Duran and Ollie Watkins after both were the subject of January transfer bids.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's last-gasp Ollie Watkins bid hints at muddled thinking, writes IAN HERBERT... as Liverpool owner John W Henry once asked, what are they smoking?
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: An insultingly low offer, reportedly £45million, made to a direct rival, at a time when everyone knew that Al Nassr were about to offer Villa more than £62m for Jhon Duran.

arts.ttl: 'Villa Park bedlam sums up Celtic's gripping European campaign'
arts.sum: Celtic's enthralling defeat at Aston Villa was a near-perfect illustration of the club's gripping, and ultimately successful, Champions League campaign.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa's earn mega £75m boost after Champions League progress
arts.sum: Beyond the £42m earned in prize money, Villa also made around £15m in gate receipts from their league phase fixtures. Qualification for the last 16 is worth a whopping £9.3m, while each position in the table is worth £232k, meaning the club that finishes 36th earned that figure with an additional £232k added for every higher ranking after all eight matches.

arts.ttl: Villa's Duran close to move to Saudi club Al-Nassr
arts.sum: A reported £65m deal for Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran to join Saudi Arabian club Al-Nassr is close to being completed.

arts.ttl: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs. Aston Villa: Head-to-head record and past meetings
